description: User repeatedly runs the same git-add-commit-push command for dotfiles by hand across sessions instead of relying on automation
User manually hunts for disk hogs (tmp files, stale caches, large exports) across sessions rather than having scheduled cleanup
User makes recurring small adjustments to autodoro behavior (exclusions, block screen, timers) across multiple sessions that could be driven by a single config surface
User manually evaluates and switches whisper transcription models for speed/quality tradeoffs instead of having an automated benchmark or update-checker
User tracks security hardening tasks across sessions by memory and ad-hoc research notes rather than a persistent structured checklist
